description: Scoop - A command-line installer for Windows.

next.name: add
tip: E: add upgrade 'scoop update *' 'Updates all apps'

next.name: known
tip: You can add them without the repo remote address

root.name: cache
tip: E: cache                --- Show all download caches
cache rm 7zip sudo   --- Remove 7zip sudo download cache

next.name: rm
tip: Remove download cache for specified applications
E: rm *     --- Remove all download caches

root.name: cat
tip: Display the content of a specified application's manifest

root.name: checkup
tip: Check if Scoop has potential issues

next.name: abgox-abyss-app-shortcuts-action
tip: It is a config in abyss bucket (https://github.com/abgox/abyss).
Don't create shortcuts defined in the manifest.
Create shortcuts defined in the manifest.
If the app creates shortcuts via installer, don't create shortcuts defined in the manifest; otherwise, create them.

next.name: abgox-abyss-app-uninstall-action
tip: Note: Currently, whether or not to contain 2, it will remove the files/directories created via Link.
It is a config in abyss bucket (https://github.com/abgox/abyss).
Attempt to terminate processes before uninstallation/update.
Attempt to terminate processes before uninstallation/update, and remove the files/directories created via Link.
Attempt to terminate processes before uninstallation/update, remove the files/directories created via Link, and remove the temporary data.
Attempt to terminate processes before uninstallation/update, and remove the temporary data.

next.name: abgox-scoop-install-url-replace-from
tip: The URL prefix to be replaced.

next.name: "^https://github.com|^https://raw.githubusercontent.com"
tip: Replace URLs starting with https://github.com and https://raw.githubusercontent.com

next.name: abgox-scoop-install-url-replace-to
tip: The URL prefix to be replaced with.

next.name: aria2-enabled
tip: Aria2 will be used for downloading of artifacts.

next.name: aria2-max-connection-per-server
tip: The maximum number of connections to one server for each download.

next.name: aria2-min-split-size
tip: Downloaded files will be splitted by this configured size and downloaded using multiple connections.

next.name: aria2-retry-wait
tip: Number of seconds to wait between retries.

next.name: aria2-split
tip: Number of connections used for downlaod.

next.name: aria2-warning-enabled
tip: Enable Aria2c warning which is shown while downloading.

next.name: autostash_on_conflict
tip: When a conflict is detected during updating, Scoop will auto-stash the uncommitted changes.
Default is false, which will abort the update

next.name: cache_path
tip: Defaults to cache folder under Scoop root directory.

next.name: cat_style
tip: When set to a non-empty string, Scoop will use 'bat' to display the manifest for the `scoop cat` command and while doing manifest review.
The accepted values are the same as ones passed to the --style flag of 'bat'.
You need to install 'bat' using the following ways, otherwise errors will be thrown.

next.name: auto
tip: same as 'default', unless the output is piped.

next.name: grid
tip: vertical/horizontal lines to separate side bar and the header from the content.

next.name: header-filesize
tip: show file sizes before the content.

next.name: numbers
tip: show line numbers in the side bar.

next.name: snip
tip: draw separation lines between distinct line ranges.

next.name: debug
tip: Additional and detailed output will be shown.

next.name: default_architecture
tip: Allow to configure preferred architecture for application installation.
If not specified, architecture is determined by system.

next.name: force_update
tip: Force apps updating to bucket's version.

next.name: gh_token
tip: GitHub API token used to make authenticated requests.
This is essential for checkver and similar functions to run without incurring rate limits and download from private repositories.

next.name: global_path
tip: Path to Scoop root directory for global apps.

next.name: hold_update_until
tip: Disable/Hold Scoop self-updates, until the specified date.
`scoop hold scoop` will set the value to one day later.
'YYYY/MM/DD' or any other forms that accepted by '[System.DateTime]::Parse()'

next.name: ignore_running_processes
tip: When set to false (default), Scoop would stop its procedure immediately if it detects any target app process is running.
When set to true, Scoop only displays a warning message and continues procedure.

next.name: no_junction
tip: The 'current' version alias will not be used.
Shims and shortcuts will point to specific version instead.

next.name: private_hosts
tip: Array of private hosts that need additional authentication.
For example, if you want to access a private GitHub repository, you need to add the host to this list with 'match' and 'headers' strings.

next.name: proxy
tip: By default, Scoop will use the proxy settings from Internet Options, but with anonymous authentication.

next.name: scoop_branch
tip: Allow to use different branch than master.
Could be used for testing specific functionalities before released into all users.
If you want to receive updates earlier to test new functionalities use develop

next.name: scoop_repo
tip: Git repository containining scoop source code.
This configuration is useful for custom forks.

next.name: show_manifest
tip: Displays the manifest of every app that's about to be installed, then asks user if they wish to proceed.

next.name: update_nightly
tip: Nightly version is formatted as 'nightly-yyyyMMdd' and will be updated after one day if this is set to true.
Otherwise, nightly version will not be updated unless `--force` is used.

next.name: use_external_7zip
tip: External 7zip (from PATH) will be used for archives extraction.

next.name: use_isolated_path
tip: When set to true, Scoop will use `SCOOP_PATH` environment variable to store apps' `PATH`.
When set to arbitrary non-empty string, Scoop will use that string as the environment variable name instead.
This is useful when you want to isolate Scoop from the system `PATH`.

next.name: use_lessmsi
tip: Prefer lessmsi utility over native msiexec.

next.name: use_sqlite_cache
tip: This is useful for speeding up `scoop search` and `scoop shim` commands.

next.name: virustotal_api_key
tip: API key used for uploading/scanning files using virustotal.

root.name: depends
tip: List dependencies for an app, ordered by installation sequence

root.name: download
tip: Download apps in the cache folder and verify hashes
E: download git                     --- Download an app without installing it
download gh@2.7.0                --- Download a different version of an app
download https://xxx/sudo.json   --- Download an app from a manifest via URL
download path/to/app.json        --- Download an app from a local manifest on the computer

option.name: --force
tip: Force the download and overwrite the download cache

option.name: --no-update-scoop
tip: Only download without updating Scoop if there's an update available

root.name: export
tip: Export installed apps, buckets (and optional config) in JSON format
E: export -c > ~/Desktop/scoop_file.json   --- Export to scoop_file.json under the Desktop directory

option.name: --config
tip: Include Scoop's configuration in the export

root.name: hold
tip: Disable updates for a specified app

option.name: --global
tip: Disable updates for a specified app globally

root.name: home
tip: Open the homepage of an app

root.name: import
tip: Import installed apps, buckets (and config) from a specified file in JSON format

root.name: info
tip: Display information about a specific application

root.name: install
tip: E: install sudo           --- Search sudo in each bucket and install if found
install main/sudo      --- Search sudo only in main and install if found
install -u main/sudo   --- Install application without updating Scoop

root.name: list
tip: E: list      --- List all installed applications
list i    --- List applications with names containing 'i'
list i$   --- List applications ending with 'i'

root.name: prefix
tip: Return the path for a specified application

root.name: search
tip: E: search sudo        --- Search sudo in each bucket (order follows scoop bucket list)
search main/sudo   --- Search sudo only in main

next.name: alter
tip: Replace the target source of a shim

next.name: list
tip: List all shims or matching shims

next.name: rm
tip: (This may remove shims added by application manifests, be cautious)

root.name: status
tip: Display status and check for new app versions

option.name: --local
tip: Check the status of locally installed apps only and disable remote fetching/checking of Scoop and buckets

root.name: unhold
tip: Enable updates for a specified app

option.name: --global
tip: Enable updates for a specified app globally

option.name: --purge
tip: Remove persistent data under the persist directory

option.name: --force
tip: Force update even if no new versions

root.name: virustotal
tip: Look up the hash or URL of an app on virustotal.com

option.name: --no-depends
tip: By default, it also checks all dependencies. This option bypasses it

option.name: --no-update-scoop
tip: Only check without updating Scoop if there's an update available

option.name: --scan
tip: Submit download URLs for analysis (and future retrieval) for packages without VirusTotal information

root.name: which
tip: Locate a shim/executable (similar to the 'which' command on Linux)

option.name: --version
tip: Show Scoop version and the latest commit information of the buckets

config.name: exclude_buckets
tip: Buckets to be excluded when dynamically generating completions.
Multiple buckets are separated by |, for example "aaa|bbb"
